title: Lamb Cacciatore in Peruvian Bowl
description: A classic Italian dish with a twist, featuring lamb, onions, and spices, served in a crispy Peruvian bowl
instructions: Season the lamb with salt, pepper, and Italian seasoning.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the lamb until browned on both sides.
Transfer the lamb to the oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the lamb is cooking, sauté the onion and bell pepper in the same skillet until tender.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
To assemble the bowls, place the cooked lamb on top of a crispy Peruvian bowl, followed by the onion and bell pepper mixture.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
